description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/kimlab/linux-anvil:latest Docker image with a cache at .conda_packages. Define stages lint, build, test, and deploy. In the lint stage add a lint job that runs the shared conda configuration, installs isort, flake8 and mypy for PYTHON_VERSION=3.6, then checks code with python -m isort -c, python -m flake8 and python -m mypy. In the build stage add a build-py36 job that sets PYTHON_VERSION=3.6, creates conda package directories, configures conda channels, runs conda build . --no-test --python $PYTHON_VERSION --output-folder $CI_PROJECT_DIR/conda-bld and stores the conda-bld directory as an artifact. In the test stage add test-py36 (with coverage regex) that depends on build-py36, copies the built packages, indexes them, runs conda build . --test --python $PYTHON_VERSION and saves the generated environment file as an artifact, plus pages and test-pages jobs that depend on the docs steps, copy packages, index, install the built package locally, install sphinx, sphinx_rtd_theme, recommonmark, nbsphinx, then run sphinx-build docs public, publishing the public/ directory as a pages artifact (pages runs only on master or tags, test-pages runs on other branches). In the deploy stage add deploy-py36 that runs only on master, installs twine, renames wheel files to manylinux1, and uploads conda tarballs to Anaconda using $ANACONDA_TOKEN and wheels to PyPI via twine.
